comment.body:
"7004.41 - 7038.49 upside zone in case of vol crush that the market prices in, and
6789.12 - 6835.08 downside zone in case of vol up.
This is a 34.84% difference. Way lower than what the speed profile implies (82.57%). This high discrepancy tells me that the market expects a way thinner left-tail than what the actual convexity makes possible! And this is very dangerous, as vomma is negative until Friday. So the downside vomma zone is a major pivot that can catch many participants off-guard."
